arts.ttl: How to watch Aston Villa vs Celtic: TV channel and live stream for Champions League today
arts.sum: Aston Villa could still finish in the top eight of the league phase

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton and John Hartson react to news of Kieran Tierney's return to Celtic
arts.sum: Chris Sutton and John Hartson delighted as Kieran Tierney is set for Celtic return Brendan Rodgers has confirmed Kieran Tierney will return to Celtic, it’s just a case of when the Arsenal star will don the green and white colours again.

arts.ttl: Jota's iconic Celtic song found Paulo Bernardo BEFORE he joined Hoops and now he's ready to turn up the volume
arts.sum: The Portuguese stars are set to team up at last in Glasgow's East End

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers’ record v Aston Villa will make Celtic fans feel confident for Champions League clash
arts.sum: From beating Villa’s Emery the last time he met him when Rodgers’ Leicester City side recorded a 4-2 win at Villa Park in 2023 to that infamous 7-1 defeat when PSG beat Celtic in 2017. This will be the first meeting between Celtic and Villa, but it won’t be the first time Brendan Rodgers has faced Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Celtic: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Aston Villa vs Celtic in the Champions League, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney to Celtic: Brendan Rodgers confirms when Arsenal defender will re-join Scottish giants
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers confirms that Kieran Tierney's return to Celtic "will definitely take place in the summer", although there is still hope that the Arsenal defender could move to Glasgow this month.

arts.ttl: 'What a finish' - Watch as ex-Celtic midfielder suffers 'freak' own goal shocker
arts.sum: 'What a finish' - Watch as ex-Celtic midfielder suffers 'freak' own goal shocker

arts.ttl: TAKING ON EMERY IS NO LAUGHING MATTER: Rodgers hits out at those who once ridiculed Aston Villa boss
arts.sum: As Unai Emery's incompatibility with Arsenal became obvious to all, he faced humiliation and embarrassment.

arts.ttl: Alex Valle shares emotional farewell message as Celtic exit confirmed
arts.sum: Alex Valle has shared an emotional farewell message after his exit from Celtic was confirmed.

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer news: 'Best striker since Henrik Larsson' leaves club as Jota secures emotional return
arts.sum: Celtic confirm the return of Jota in an £8m deal from Rennes, but lose a fan favourite in the opposite direction.
